name: Shanks Clubhouse
about: Shanks Clubhouse is an indoor golf simulator facility located in East Greenwich, RI. The venue operates on a reservation-only basis and is open daily from 9am to 11pm (12am on Thursdays-Saturdays). It features Uneekor camera-based simulators and offers a variety of software options, including TGC 2019 for full golf rounds and creative 3D arcade games. Pricing is set at $50 per hour per bay, with a group rate of $200 per hour. The facility is well-suited for individual practice, group play, and private events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Uneekor camera-based simulators provide superior tracking for both drives and short game shots
The technology suite includes TGC 2019 for realistic rounds and arcade-style games for variety and entertainment
Convenient partnerships with The Waysider restaurant for direct food delivery to the bays

food_and_drink.notes: Food is delivered directly to your bay from The Waysider restaurant next door via a QR code on your table.
No mention of alcohol being served on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: State of the art Uneekor camera based simulators.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether they provide club rentals, so it is recommended to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink policies are not specified, but food can be ordered directly from The Waysider restaurant next door and delivered to your bay.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is not specifically marketed as kid-friendly and appears to cater more to adults, especially for events like corporate parties and bachelor/bachelorette parties.
